zones.name: Front / high visibility
zones.strategy: Keep mowing clean, monitor weeds, and avoid cosmetic overreaction during heat.
recommendations: Use this zone for visible turf quality decisions.
Mark thin spots for fall seed instead of pushing spring fixes.

zones.name: Dry / hot edges
zones.condition: Likely to show wilt or heat stress first
zones.strategy: Check irrigation coverage and soil moisture before fertilizer or seed decisions.
recommendations: Watch for footprints that do not rebound.
Use this zone to calibrate watering decisions.

zones.name: Thin / repair areas
zones.strategy: Track areas for September seed, aeration, soil correction, or watering changes.
recommendations: Avoid large spring seeding unless there is no alternative.
Pair fall seed plans with watering and soil prep.

zones.name: Shade / traffic
zones.condition: May behave differently from open turf
zones.strategy: Reduce traffic when wet and decide whether turf is realistic in the area.
recommendations: Do not treat shade failure as a simple fertilizer problem.
Consider non-turf solutions if grass repeatedly fails.
